import requests, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
api_key = os.getenv\('GOOGLE_API_KEY'\)
address = '基隆市 中正區  信一路168號1樓'
r = requests.get\('https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/geocode/json', params={'address': address, 'key': api_key}\)
import json
data = r.json\(\)
print\('status:', data['status']\)
if data['results']:
    loc = data['results'][0]['geometry']['location']
    print\('lat/lng:', loc\)
")
